text:
visits for health care 

SAS Format: NMA 

0: NONE 

1: 1 TIME 

2: 2 

3: 3 

4: 4 

5: 5 TO 9 

6: 10 OR MORE TIMES 

cnd_angina: RECODE : Dr ever said had: Angina or coronary heart disease 

SAS Format: YNA 

1: YES 

2: NO 

cnd_cancer: RECODE : Dr ever said had: Cancer, other than skin cancer 

SAS Format: YNA 

1: YES 

2: NO 

cnd_copd: RECODE : Dr ever said had: Emphysema, asthma or COPD 

SAS Format: YNA 

1: YES 

2: NO 

cnd_diabetes: RECODE : Dr ever said had: Diabetes or high blood
